summary: The pnpm audit job found a vulnerability in the dependency tree and exited with a non-zero code. One moderate-severity vulnerability was detected, causing the CI job to fail.
root_cause: pnpm audit detected 1 moderate severity vulnerability in the project's dependencies, causing the audit command to exit with code 1 and fail the CI job.

evidence.reason: Confirms that the audit scan detected at least one vulnerable dependency.
Specifies the severity level of the found vulnerability, confirming it is a moderate-severity issue.
Shows the audit command returned a non-zero exit code, which caused the CI job to fail.

suggested_fix: Identify and update the vulnerable dependency reported by pnpm audit (run `pnpm audit` locally to see the full vulnerability report including package name and fix version), then upgrade or patch the affected package to a non-vulnerable version.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
